series_metadata.series_description: This series includes, but is not limited to, reapportionment and redistricting maps, reapportionment and redistricting information, census materials and supporting documentation received following each decennial apportionment and redistricting.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain twenty (20) years. State Archives to review records prior to disposition, then may destroy. ; Electronic: Retain twenty (20) years. State Archives to review records prior to disposition, then may destroy., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Delete
